character.definition: (non-standard Japanese variant of 喜), to like, love, enjoy; a joyful thing
(same as 壑) the bed of a torrent; a gully, a pool
farm tools; a spade or shovel
(same as 抌) to hit or to strike heavily, to dip, to administer; to control, to govern; to treat; to cure, to punish
(non-classical form of 綱) the large of a net, main point, principle
(same as 繹) a kind of sacrifice offered to gods or the deceased; rotten food; food; cakes and biscuits
(same as 麗) beautiful; elegant; fair; fine
a mound, embankment; the earthen altar to the god of the soil
wink, blink; in a wink, a flash
sharp; a keen edge; sharp point
